[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A young woman sits on a bed indoors, leaning forward slightly with her hands resting on the mattress while looking at the camera.

Main Subject:
A person with long, straight dark hair is seated on a bed with her legs bent to the side and her arms resting forward on the mattress. She wears a light-colored short-sleeve T-shirt with small printed details near the chest. Her face is turned slightly to the left of the camera, eyes partially closed, lips relaxed, and her posture is relaxed.

Setting:
The scene appears to be indoors in a bedroom. The bed has a light-colored sheet and patterned surface. Behind her, a gray wall is visible, and on the right side of the image there is a white box or container stacked with other items. On the left side, a light-colored curtain or panel hangs vertically near the edge of the frame. The lighting is bright and even, with daylight-like illumination coming from the left.

Visual Details:
The image is framed vertically and shot from a low, close angle near the bed surface. The bed occupies the lower half of the frame, while the person’s upper body and head fill the center. Colors include pale grays and whites in the room, with the person’s light shirt contrasting against the darker hair. The curtain or panel on the left has a translucent look and soft vertical folds.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person sitting on a bed in a bedroom, facing the camera with a relaxed posture. A gray wall, a hanging light panel on the left, and stacked items with a white box on the right are visible in the background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

3:01  
[whatsapp icon]  
…  
[moon icon]  
[signal/wifi icons]  
19  

# Structured Version

- **Time:** 3:01  
- **Icons/Status:** WhatsApp icon; additional status icons ([unclear]); moon icon; signal/wifi icons  
- **Battery/indicator:** 19  

# Notes

- The screenshot is mostly a photo with overlay UI icons. No other readable words are clearly visible.
- Any text besides the time appears to be part of icons/status indicators; exact labels are not readable, so they’re marked as `[unclear]`.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
